Video.summary: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.
Video.title: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Image.alt: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Video.summary: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.
Video.title: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Image.alt: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Video.summary: Arielle discusses her book “Turn Your Mate Into Your SoulMate” and shares why everyone needs to read this if they want a deep fulfilling relationship.
Video.title: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Image.alt: How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford
How To Make Your Mate Your Soulmate With Arielle Ford

Video.summary: In our very first solo episode of Rooted in Wellness, we explore the transformative power of being anchored like a sturdy tree—steady, grounded, and unwavering amidst life's storms. We'll illuminate how feeling rooted manifests as inner peace, emotional stability, and a profound connection with yourself and the world around you.
Video.title: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Image.alt: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Video.summary: Pilot episode of Resonate With Sara for Season 1
Video.title: Pilot

Video.summary: Trauma overwhelms the heart and mind, but healing requires grief. This lesson guides you to honor your triggers as maps of pain and recovery, reclaim choice in how you live with trauma, and create space for healing while moving through grief with awareness and care.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 5

Video.summary: Loss is inevitable, but self-blame and unhealed wounds can deepen the pain. This lesson explores how past hurt shapes our relationships, why we’re drawn to the familiar, and how romantic myths keep us stuck. By facing reality and healing old patterns, we find freedom and healthier love.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 6

Video.summary: Betrayal brings a unique grief because it comes from someone we trusted. The search for answers can keep us stuck, as the mind looks for reasons while the heart seeks healing. This lesson helps you process the pain, work with difficult thoughts, and rebuild trust and hope for the future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 7

Video.summary: Job loss and estrangement can shake your identity and bring deep, often unspoken grief. This lesson helps you honor the sadness and anger, redefine yourself beyond work or broken ties, and move forward with clarity, confidence, and self-compassion.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 8

Video.summary: Facing death brings grief, hope, and hard decisions. This lesson explores being present at the end of life, understanding care options, and honoring the needs of the dying. By focusing on what matters most to your loved one, you can navigate this tender time with clarity and compassion.
Video.grandparentTitle: Help for the Hurting Heart with David Kessler
Video.title: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9

Image.alt: Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9
Help for the Hurting Heart Day 9

Video.summary: Are aphrodisiacs really a love potion? And the experts weigh in on the science of sex addiction. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs
Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs
Sex Talk - The Truth About Aphrodisiacs

Video.summary: Self-confidence is sexy, but how do you get it? Plus, what happens in Vegas doesn't stay in Vegas. Avoiding sexually transmitted infections after casual sex on vacation. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation
Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation
Sex Talk - Beware of Casual Sex on Vacation

Video.summary: Gerard HipHopGamer Williams heats it up on the show! Bringing the heat of Hip Hop and video gaming on the show, this is why we call him the GOAT OF THE GAME, you will learn a lot from this interview about Rico and Gerard that makes the interview so powerful. Discipline is key to everyone that wants to be successful. Let's goo!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Gerard HipHopGamer Williams

Video.summary: Chris Cuffaro, Photographer, Producer and Director where you those childhood memories that you seen back in the day of photos of your favorite artists and you may have wondered who took those photos, well look no further, because Rico No Suave is Interviewing him and you are in a treat.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chris Cuffaro

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chris Cuffaro
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chris Cuffaro
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Chris Cuffaro

Video.summary: Inspirational Speaker Alejandro J Tornato will have you inspired to live postive everyday! I know that all of you are ready to get inspired, listening to a leadership coach will change your ways of life but also will uplift you to do better everyday! Enjoy the Interview.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Rico No Suave Talk Show
Video.title: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Alejandro Tornato

Image.alt: The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Alejandro Tornato
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Alejandro Tornato
The Rico No Suave Talk Show - Alejandro Tornato

Video.summary: We spend a third of our lives fast asleep, but it’s not always so easy to get there. We ask an expert about how you can get a good night’s rest.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Sleep

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Sleep
Dr. Q&A- Sleep
Dr. Q&A- Sleep

Video.summary: Sun exposure increases your risk of skin damage. We break down these common skin issues and what you can do about them.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin
Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin
Dr. Q&A - Sun & Your Skin

Video.summary: It’s often difficult to talk about mental illness with a child or teenager. We talk to an expert to help guide you through the conversation.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health
Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health
Dr. Q&A - Youth Mental Health

Video.summary: Breast cancer researcher and physician talks about the latest therapies used to treat breast cancer and the advances that are bringing hope and healing to millions of people because of clinical trials.
Video.title: Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment

Image.alt: Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment
Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment
Dr. Q&A- Cancer Diagnosis and Treatment

Video.summary: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self.
Video.title: Day 6: Breath Utkatasana

Image.alt: Day 6: Breath Utkatasana
Day 6: Breath Utkatasana
Day 6: Breath Utkatasana

Video.summary: Today we explore awareness through breath, movement and the posture Virabhadrasana B.
Video.title: Day 7: Awareness Virabhadrasana B

Image.alt: Day 7: Awareness Virabhadrasana B
Day 7: Awareness Virabhadrasana B
Day 7: Awareness Virabhadrasana B

Video.summary: Invite the mind into harmony as you take it nice and easy with today’s posture, Janu Sirsasana.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana
Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana
Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana

Video.summary: Invite kindness into your body, using Marichasana A as a framework for integrating tenderness into your practice.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A
Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A
Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A

Video.summary: The team, led by Anand, prepare for their motorcycle adventure to the four sacred peaks. The first practice ride is here in the birthplace of yoga, but it is not encouraging as monsoons are destroying roads and villages, Fred seems a liability and Ryan's seizures could be an issue.
Video.title: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh
Road to Dharma - Quantum Leaps in Rishikesh

Video.summary: Jen and Jeff’s dream is to save their marriage on this journey, but it’s clear they are in different mindsets from the beginning. We are reminded that Anand himself had a prophecy of death and his teachers and life adventures helped guide him to freedom. Heading towards Kedarnath, night’s darkness sets in and Ryan sees someone Flip over their handlebars…
Video.title: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Image.alt: Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night
Road to Dharma - End of Stories - A Trechorous Night

Video.summary: Our first glimpse of the first peak, Kedarnath, the temple of death. Anand reminds us that What needs to die is part of the ego, fears, and comforts. Ken thinks people are riding recklessly, Mario takes his first spill, injuring his passenger Aizhan. Jeff ‘s comments further alienate Jen, but motivate her to rise up to greatness…
Video.title: Death of Ego at Kedarnath

Image.alt: Death of Ego at Kedarnath
Death of Ego at Kedarnath
Death of Ego at Kedarnath

Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: HELP WANTED is the story of an immigrant mechanic stuck in a middle-age malaise who learns to re-appreciate his life through the eyes of a confident new employee.
Video.title: Episode 1

Episode 1
Episode 1
